query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN id < 300000 THEN 'Old (210xxx)'
    ELSE 'New (300xxx)'
  END as grupo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad IS NOT NULL AND costo_por_unidad > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_costo
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES'
GROUP BY grupo;
